searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email or phone…
emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters.

export.title: Export drivers
export.description: Choose a date range to export drivers registered during that period, or leave empty for all.
export.dateHint: Leave both fields empty to export all drivers.

modal.title: Driver details
modal.description: View driver information and update their account status.

fullView.title: Driver Full View
fullView.description: Review key driver data, documents, and document expiry dates.
fullView.invalidDescription: The driver id in this URL is not valid.
fullView.notFound: Driver details could not be loaded.

status.label: Driver status
status.confirmDescription: You are about to change the driver status to {{status}}.

documents.title: Documents
documents.description: Expand to review all uploaded driver documents.
documents.modalDescription: Only supported file types are previewed in this modal.
documents.unsupportedType: This file type is not supported for preview. Only image and PDF files are allowed.
documents.pdfPreviewLabel: PDF document preview is available in the modal.
documents.previewUnavailable: Preview is not available for this file type.
documents.empty: No documents are available for this driver.

expiries.title: Expiration Control
expiries.description: Expand to edit National ID and License expiry date and time.
expiries.nationalIdLabel: National ID expiry date and time

trucks.title: Truck Data
trucks.description: Review linked trucks for this driver.
trucks.empty: No trucks linked to this driver.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Review current status reason and latest verification/admin note.
notes.statusReasonFallback: No status reason available for current status ({{status}}).
notes.verificationNoteFallback: No verification note has been added yet.
